privileged_info_summary: The task operates on real-world San Francisco UrbanSim datasets (sanfran_public.h5 and zones.json) sourced from the UDST repository. The verifier solely validates the internal mathematical consistency of the generated CSV (e.g., expected_d_pop = (n_pop - z_work) + d_jobs) and correct descending sorting by surge. It does not cross-reference the extracted population or job values against the true source data, nor does it explicitly validate the mathematical calculation of the 'day_night_ratio' column. All expected file paths, required columns, and top_n_zones constraints exactly match the explicit instructions and verifier logic.
